name: National Defence Academy (NDA) - Army
description: A premier joint services academy that trains cadets for the Indian Army. After 3 years of training at NDA and 1 year at IMA, you become a commissioned officer.
entry_details: Selection through NDA written exam (Mathematics & GAT) followed by SSB interview. Training includes 3 years at NDA, Khadakwasla and 1 year at IMA, Dehradun. Comprehensive military training with academic education.
offers: Permanent Commission, starting salary ₹56,100-1,77,500, free accommodation, medical facilities, canteen facilities, 60 days annual leave, pension after retirement, opportunities for higher education and specialization, post-retirement benefits.

name: National Defence Academy (NDA) - Navy
description: A premier joint services academy that trains cadets for the Indian Navy. After 3 years at NDA and 1 year at INA, you become a naval officer.
entry_details: Selection through NDA written exam (Mathematics & GAT) followed by SSB interview. Training includes 3 years at NDA, Khadakwasla and 1 year at INA, Ezhimala. Naval training with technical specialization.
offers: Permanent Commission, starting salary ₹56,100-1,77,500, sea duty allowances, free accommodation, medical facilities, 60 days annual leave, pension, opportunities for technical courses and higher education, post-retirement benefits.

name: National Defence Academy (NDA) - Air Force
description: A premier joint services academy that trains cadets for the Indian Air Force. After 3 years at NDA and 1.5 years at AFA, you become an air force officer.
role: Flying Officer in Indian Air Force
entry_details: Selection through NDA written exam (Mathematics & GAT) followed by SSB interview and flying aptitude test. Training includes 3 years at NDA and 1.5 years at AFA, Hyderabad. Aviation and technical training.
offers: Permanent Commission, starting salary ₹56,100-1,77,500, flying allowance, free accommodation, medical facilities, 60 days annual leave, pension, opportunities for advanced flying courses, higher education, post-retirement benefits.

name: Combined Defence Services (CDS) - IMA
description: Direct entry for graduates to join the Indian Military Academy (IMA). After 1.5 years of training, you become a commissioned officer in the Army.
entry_details: Selection through CDS written exam (English, GK, Mathematics) followed by SSB interview. Training duration is 1.5 years at IMA, Dehradun. Direct entry for graduates without NDA.
offers: Permanent Commission, starting salary ₹56,100-1,77,500, free accommodation, medical facilities, 60 days annual leave, pension, opportunities for higher education, specialization courses, post-retirement benefits.

name: Combined Defence Services (CDS) - INA
description: Direct entry for engineering graduates to join the Indian Naval Academy (INA). After training, you become a naval officer specializing in technical roles.
role: Sub Lieutenant in Indian Navy (Technical Branch)
entry_details: Selection through CDS written exam (English, GK, Mathematics) followed by SSB interview. Training at INA, Ezhimala. Technical branch specialization for engineering graduates.
offers: Permanent Commission, starting salary ₹56,100-1,77,500, technical allowance, sea duty allowances, free accommodation, medical facilities, 60 days annual leave, pension, technical specialization opportunities, post-retirement benefits.

name: Combined Defence Services (CDS) - AFA
description: Direct entry for graduates with Physics/Maths or Engineering to join the Air Force Academy (AFA). After training, you become an air force officer.
role: Flying Officer in Indian Air Force
entry_details: Selection through CDS written exam (English, GK, Mathematics) followed by SSB interview and flying aptitude test. Training at AFA, Hyderabad. Suitable for graduates with Physics/Maths background.
offers: Permanent Commission, starting salary ₹56,100-1,77,500, flying allowance, free accommodation, medical facilities, 60 days annual leave, pension, opportunities for advanced flying courses, higher education, post-retirement benefits.

name: SSC Tech (Short Service Commission Technical) - Army
description: Short Service Commission for engineering graduates in the Army. You serve for 10+4 years in technical roles, handling engineering projects and technical operations.
entry_details: Selection through SSB interview directly for engineering graduates. Training duration varies based on branch. Service period: 10 years extendable by 4 years. Option for Permanent Commission based on performance.
offers: Starting salary ₹56,100-1,77,500, technical allowance, free accommodation, medical facilities, 60 days annual leave, gratuity after service, option for Permanent Commission, opportunities for technical courses, post-service career opportunities.

name: SSC Tech (Short Service Commission Technical) - Navy
description: Short Service Commission for engineering graduates in the Navy. You serve for 10+4 years in technical branches, managing naval engineering and technical systems.
entry_details: Selection through SSB interview for engineering graduates. Training includes naval technical courses. Service period: 10 years extendable by 4 years. Option for Permanent Commission based on performance.
offers: Starting salary ₹56,100-1,77,500, technical allowance, sea duty allowances, free accommodation, medical facilities, 60 days annual leave, gratuity, option for Permanent Commission, technical specialization, post-service opportunities.

name: SSC Tech (Short Service Commission Technical) - Air Force
description: Short Service Commission for engineering graduates in the Air Force. You serve for 10+4 years in technical branches, managing aircraft systems and technical operations.
role: Flying Officer (Technical) in Indian Air Force
entry_details: Selection through SSB interview for engineering graduates. Training includes air force technical courses. Service period: 10 years extendable by 4 years. Option for Permanent Commission based on performance.
offers: Starting salary ₹56,100-1,77,500, technical allowance, free accommodation, medical facilities, 60 days annual leave, gratuity, option for Permanent Commission, opportunities for technical and aviation courses, post-service career options.

name: Technical Graduate Course (TGC) - Army
description: Permanent Commission entry for engineering graduates in the Army. You become a permanent officer in technical corps, leading engineering projects and technical operations.
role: Lieutenant (Permanent Commission) in Indian Army - Technical Corps
entry_details: Selection through SSB interview for engineering graduates. Direct Permanent Commission in technical corps. Training includes technical and military courses. Career progression to higher ranks.
offers: Permanent Commission, starting salary ₹56,100-1,77,500, technical allowance, free accommodation, medical facilities, 60 days annual leave, pension, opportunities for higher education, technical specialization, leadership roles, post-retirement benefits.

name: NCC Special Entry Scheme - Army
description: Special entry scheme for NCC certificate holders with graduate degrees. After training at IMA, you become a commissioned officer in the Army.
entry_details: Direct SSB interview for NCC 'C' certificate holders with graduate degree. No written exam required. Training at IMA, Dehradun. Special preference for NCC cadets.
offers: Permanent Commission, starting salary ₹56,100-1,77,500, free accommodation, medical facilities, 60 days annual leave, pension, opportunities for higher education, specialization courses, leadership development, post-retirement benefits.

name: Judge Advocate General (JAG) - Army
description: Legal branch entry for law graduates in the Army. You serve as a legal officer, handling military law, court martials, and legal advisory services.
role: Lieutenant (Legal) in Indian Army - JAG Branch
entry_details: Selection through SSB interview for law graduates. Direct entry into Judge Advocate General (JAG) branch. Training includes military law and legal procedures. Unique legal career in armed forces.
offers: Permanent Commission, starting salary ₹56,100-1,77,500, legal allowance, free accommodation, medical facilities, 60 days annual leave, pension, opportunities for legal specialization, higher education in law, post-retirement legal practice opportunities.

name: University Entry Scheme (UES) - Navy
description: Direct entry for final year engineering students from selected universities. After training, you become a naval officer in technical branches.
role: Sub Lieutenant in Indian Navy (Technical Branch)
entry_details: Campus recruitment from selected engineering colleges. SSB interview for final year students. Training at INA after graduation. Early career entry for engineering students.
offers: Permanent Commission, starting salary ₹56,100-1,77,500, technical allowance, sea duty allowances, free accommodation, medical facilities, 60 days annual leave, pension, technical specialization, higher education opportunities, post-retirement benefits.

name: AFCAT (Air Force Common Admission Test)
description: Common admission test for graduates and engineers to join the Air Force. You can join as Flying Officer in Flying, Technical, or Ground Duty branches.
role: Flying Officer in Indian Air Force
entry_details: Selection through AFCAT written exam (Verbal Ability, Numerical Ability, Reasoning, General Awareness) followed by SSB interview. Multiple branches: Flying, Technical, Ground Duty. Training at respective air force academies.
offers: Permanent Commission, starting salary ₹56,100-1,77,500, flying allowance (for flying branch), free accommodation, medical facilities, 60 days annual leave, pension, opportunities for advanced courses, higher education, post-retirement benefits.

name: UPSC Civil Services Exam (IAS/IPS)
description: The premier civil services examination conducted by UPSC. Based on your rank, you can become an IAS officer, IPS officer, or join other civil services like IFS, IRS, etc.
entry_details: Three-stage selection: Preliminary exam (Objective), Main exam (Descriptive), and Personality Test (Interview). Based on final rank, candidates are allocated to various services. Training at respective academies like LBSNAA for IAS.
offers: Starting salary ₹56,100-2,50,000 (varies by service and rank), government accommodation, medical facilities, official vehicle, security (for IPS), 30 days annual leave, pension, opportunities for higher education, foreign postings (IFS), post-retirement opportunities in public and private sector.
